display_name: Execute the protagonist's escape and demonstrate his superhuman nature.

field_values.scene_title: Execute the protagonist's escape and demonstrate his superhuman nature.
field_values.action_summary: Realizing patrols are closing in, Carter waits for nightfall. He utilizes his extraordinary strength to leap from a high palace balcony, successfully escaping the grounds.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots to capture the scale of the leap; Tracking shots following his descent; High-angle shots looking down from the balcony.
movement_notes: Lighting transition from interior palace to exterior darkness.
field_values.transition_notes:
